raw_consumer_statement: I FILED A DISPUTE WITH AMERICAN EXPRESS IN XXXX XXXX  XXXX. THIS IS AFTER I HAVE FILED MULTIPLE DISPUTES THROUGH OUT THE YEAR AND THEY WERE DENIED AND RE APPLIED TO MY BALANCE. IN XX/XX/XXXX I LOST ACCESS TO MY XXXX ACCOUNT IT WAS HACKED. SOMEONE MADE CHARGES IN THE AMOUNT OF XXXX. I HAVE CANCELLED CARDS, TRIED TO BLOCK THE MERCHANT ALL OF WHICH AMERICAN EXPRESS DID NOT DO AFTER ASKED 3 TIMES. THE DISPUTE IN XXXX THEN BOUNCED MY DEPARTMENT TO DEPARTMENT DUE TO THE AGENT NOT FILING IT CORRECTLY AND XXXX EVENTUALLY CLOSED OUT IN XXXXXXXX XXXX  XXXX. I THEN REOPENED THIS DISPUTE. CALLED ONCE A WEEK FOR MONTHS AS I WAS BEING TOLD THEY WERE ACTIVELY WORKING ON THE DISPUTE. THEY HAVE ADDED THE BALANCE BACK TO MY ACCOUNT IN XXXX AND HAVE BEEN CHARGING ME INTEREST ON THIS AMOUNT THEY STATED WAS BEING DISPUTED MONTHLY. IN XXXX I WAS TOLD BY AN AGENT THAT THE CASE WAS NEVER REOPENED BACK IN XXXX THAT THE OTHER AGENT I SPOKE WITH MONTHLY MUST HAVE BEEN CONFUSED TO ALL THE NOTES. SO ESSENTIALLY I HAVE BEEN LIED TO FOR MONTHS. I WAS THEN TOLD TO MAKE POLICE REPORT AND THEY WOULD REOPEN THAT DISPUTE. THIS WAS DONE IN XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. CASE IS STILL EBING WORKED HOWEVER THE DISPUTED AMOUNT HAS NOT BEEN CREDITED BACK TO MY ACCOUNT FOR DURATION OF DISPUTE ALLOWING AMERICAN EXPRESS TO CONTINUE TO CHARGE ME INTEREST. I AM GETTING NO ANSWERS FROM THIS COMPANY. I WAS TOLD BY TWO AGENTS NOT TO MAKE MY PAYMENTS ON THE CARD UNTIL DISPUTE WAS SETTLED. THIS IS ON RECORDING. NOW IM GETTING THREATS FROM THE COMPANY. THEY HAVE SUSPENDED USE OF ALL MY OTHER CARDS., I WANT THIS CORRECTED IMMEDIATELY. WHAT THEY HAVE DONE IS NOT ONLY UNETHICAL BUT UNFAIR TO THE CUSTOMER WHO HAS SUBMITTED PLENTY OF PROOF THESE CHARES WERE FRAUDULENT.
